title: Tutorial screen to QSG screen
scenario: Tutorial screen navigation to Quick Start Guide displays correct image and text per Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
If this is the first launch, the Tutorial screen should appear automatically.
On the Tutorial screen, locate and tap the 'Quick Start Guide' (QSG) button or link.
Observe the QSG screen that loads.
Compare the displayed image on the QSG screen against the Figma design specification.
Compare the displayed text content on the QSG screen against the Figma design specification.
expected: The QSG screen displays the correct image and text exactly as specified in the Figma design.
